episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: In Betalgadh, India’s drug hub, Lakshmi, a struggling woman, finds abandoned sacks of marijuana and sees a chance to escape poverty. Meanwhile, ruthless drug lord Vikram Kandpal relentlessly hunts for his lost stash, leaving chaos in his wake.
